board.location: consumer unit cupboard, ground floor hallway

assumptions: Diversity factor 0.4 (domestic typical per BS 7671 Appendix 1).
Selectivity verification deferred — fault-level intent absent and engineer Ifault not declared per WI3.
Cable ampacity check assumes BS 7671 Appendix 4 Reference Method C (clipped direct).

rationale.chat_summary: 100A TN-C-S consumer unit for a UK 3-bed semi, 12-way Form 1 Hager-style enclosure. 6 final circuits all RCBO-protected via the main 30mA RCD. Busbar 100A IcW 6kA accommodates 47A diversified load. Selectivity verification pending fault-level intent — emitted as tool_call_pending per WI3. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add EV charger'.

sections.title: Board Classification
sections.summary: UK domestic consumer unit, IEC 61439-3 DBO Form 1, IP2X for indoor cupboard installation.

decisions.label: Form 1 enclosure
decisions.summary: Standard for domestic CUs — no separation between busbar and functional units required at this rating.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 230V single-phase 100A main switch from PME supply (Ze 0.35Ω declared).

decisions.label: 100A main switch
decisions.summary: Standard UK domestic main switch rating.

sections.title: Busbar Sizing
sections.summary: 100A busbar, IcW 6kA. Sum of way loads ~117A → 47A diversified at 0.4 → 100A busbar adequate with headroom.

decisions.label: 100A busbar adequate
decisions.summary: 47A diversified load × 1.5 future expansion factor fits 100A.

sections.title: Way Assignment
sections.summary: 6 ways used (W1–W6), 6 ways spare. Meets engineer-specified minimum 2.

sections.title: OCPD Selection
sections.summary: All MCBs Type B (domestic standard). In ≤ Iz verified for every circuit. Icn 6kA exceeds prospective fault current.

decisions.label: Type B curve for all circuits
decisions.summary: Domestic loads (lighting, sockets, cooker, shower) have no significant inrush.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Appendix 3 — Type B for general lighting/socket loads

sections.title: RCD Strategy
sections.summary: All 6 final circuits 30mA RCBO-protected via main RCD. Per BS 7671 411.3.3 (sockets ≤32A in domestic) + Section 701 (bathroom shower).

decisions.label: 30mA Type A RCD on every circuit
decisions.summary: Type A handles AC + pulsating DC residual — covers modern electronics.

sections.title: Cable Selection
sections.summary: Cables provided in inputs (twin-and-earth 6242Y typical). All sizes pass In ≤ Iz check at Reference Method C.

sections.title: Selectivity Verification
sections.summary: 6 cascade pairs (MAIN → each MCB) emitted as tool_call_pending. fault-level intent absent; engineer Ifault not declared. Will re-emit once fault-level skill ships.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for deferred selectivity.
